resources.string: Invalid number entered (example of valid number: 1.2)
Invalid number entered, please enter an integer (example: 1)
Skin exam once a year for the rest of your life. \nPerform a monthly self-examination to check for swollen lymph nodes. \nImaging tests performed only if specific symptoms appear.

Skin exam once a year for the rest of your life. \nPhysical exam to be performed every 6 to 12 months for the first 5 years, then once a year. \nImaging tests performed only if specific symptoms appear.

Skin exam once a year for the rest of your life. \nPhysical exam every 3 to 6 months for the first 2 years, then every 3 to 12 months for the next 3 years. \nRecommended imaging tests every 3 to 12 months, which may include chest X-ray, CT scan, PET/CT, and brain MRI.

Skin exam once a year for the rest of your life. \nPhysical exam, blood tests, and scans every 3 to 6 months for the first 2 years, then every 3 to 12 months for the next 3 years. \nRecommended imaging tests every 3 to 12 months, which may include chest X-ray, CT scan, PET/CT, and brain MRI.
